queries.question: For each author, list their name, certificate and article titles.
queries.sql: Select name, Certificate, title From journalists Join articles on articles.authorId = journalists.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?certificate ?title WHERE {
  ?journalists a :Journalists .
  ?articles a :Articles .
  ?articles p:hasjournalists ?journalists .
  ?journalists p:name ?name .
  ?journalists p:Certificate ?certificate .
  ?articles p:title ?title .
}

queries.question: Give me a list of all investigative journalists, their certificates and their article titles
queries.sql: Select name, Certificate, title From journalists Join articles on articles.authorId = journalists.id Where Investigative_Journalist=1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?certificate ?title WHERE {
  ?journalists a :Journalists .
  ?articles a :Articles .
  ?articles p:hasjournalists ?journalists .
  ?journalists p:name ?name .
  ?journalists p:Certificate ?certificate .
  ?articles p:title ?title .
  ?journalists p:Investigative_Journalist ?investigative_journalist_f .
  FILTER((STR(?investigative_journalist_f) = "1" || STR(?investigative_journalist_f) = "1.0"))
}
